meta.description: Auto-play strategy weights for FARMVERSE Match-3 Boss Combat. All weights derived from combat-formulas.ts and combat.config.ts. Used by auto-scorer to evaluate swap candidates each tick.
meta._note: Comments use _ prefix. Weights 0.0-10.0 scale. Priority lower = checked first.

atk._note: Damage per gem. Reduced by boss DEF: dmg * (1 - DEF/(DEF+500))

star._note: Damage per gem + 8 ULT charge. ULT pierce DEF at Lv5. Dual-purpose gem.

hp._note: Heal per gem. Blocked by healBlock debuff.

def._note: Shield per gem. Useless when armorBreak active.

match5.effect: Clear ALL gems of chosen type
match5._reason: Average ~12-16 gems of one type on 8x8 board with 4 types. Massive value.

matchL._reason: 9 gems cleared from 5 matched = 1.8x efficiency + AoE positioning

dodgeConfig._assassinFreqNote: Assassin freq=3 means 3 hits per attack. Each hit costs 1 dodge. 3 hits = 3 dodges consumed.

situationWeights._doc: Priority lower = checked first. First match wins. Weights: atk/hp/def/star on 0.0-10.0 scale.

healBlock._when: Boss applied healBlock debuff on player
healBlock._reason: HP gems heal 0 during healBlock. Shift all survival to DEF shield. ATK/star to end fight faster.

armorBreak._reason: DEF gems give 0 shield when armorBreak active. Must rely on HP heal for survival.

bossShield._when: Boss has active shield (80% damage reduction)
bossShield._reason: ATK deals only 20% damage during shield. Star still charges ULT (8/gem unaffected). Farm ULT + survive.

bossReflect._when: Boss has reflect (30% damage returned to player)
bossReflect._reason: High ATK = self-damage via 30% reflect. Combo x2.0 reflect can kill player. Prioritize survival, avoid big combos.

playerCritical._reason: Imminent death. HP gem heals 25+HP*0.04; at 1000HP stat = 65/gem. Need 3-4 HP gems to survive one hit. DEF shield as backup.

playerDanger._reason: Two boss hits from death. Balance survival with some offense. HP weight ~3x ATK.

playerLow._reason: Can take 2-3 hits. Slightly favor HP but maintain offense to avoid prolonged fight.

boss39Execute._reason: Boss #39 execute: x5 damage when player <20% HP. Must stay above 20% at ALL costs. Near all-in on survival.

bossAlmostDead._reason: One or two good ATK matches finish the fight. Star for ULT as finisher. Survival nearly irrelevant.

bossLowHP._reason: Push for kill. ATK full value. Star charges ULT for guaranteed finish (ULT pierce at Lv5).

bossHighDEF._reason: DEF=200 reduces ATK by 29%, DEF=300 by 38%, DEF=500 by 50%. Star charges ULT which pierces DEF at Lv5. Star ~3x more valuable than ATK.

bossHighDEFWithOtHiem._when: Boss DEF >= 200 AND Ot Hiem buff active (+50% DEF bypass at Lv5)
bossHighDEFWithOtHiem._reason: Ot Hiem Lv5 bypasses 50% DEF. Effective DEF halved: DEF=300 becomes ~150 (23% reduction). ATK viable again.

bossVeryHighDEF._reason: DEF=400+ means ATK loses 44%+ value. Star/ULT pierce is the only efficient damage path. Near all-in star.

ultAlmostReady._reason: A few more star gems fill ULT. Each star gives 8 charge. Prioritize star to reach threshold.

ultReadyBossShielded._when: ULT fully charged BUT boss has active shield
ultReadyBossShielded._reason: ULT is ready but shield blocks 80%. Don't fire ULT. Farm survival until shield expires. Star no longer needed.

eggActive._when: Boss has summoned Egg (absorbs damage before boss)
eggActive._reason: Egg must be destroyed first. Egg has no DEF so ATK is full value. Star wastes ULT on egg. Burn egg with raw ATK.

bossHealerRace._reason: Healer recovers 1.5-3% HP per tick. Must out-DPS heal rate. At 2% heal on 10K HP = 200 HP/tick. Need ~5 ATK gems/turn minimum.

bossHealerLowHP._reason: Healer low HP — one ULT or big combo kills before heal ticks. All-in damage. 30% of 10K = 3000 HP, ULT at 3.0x with ATK=100 stat = ~300 damage.

enrageLate._reason: Enrage +50% at 150s, capped x2.0 at 300s. Each boss hit hurts 50%+ more. Must finish fast but need HP/DEF to survive boosted hits.

enrageCritical._reason: Near x2.0 cap. Boss hits are devastating. Race to kill. ULT is fastest guaranteed damage.

normal._reason: Balanced offense. ATK slightly favored (40+ATK*0.6 > star 25+ATK*0.3 per gem). Star valued for ULT charge. DEF lowest priority in neutral.

specialGemCreation._reason: Rainbow clears ~12-16 gems of one type (massive). Bomb clears 9 (good AoE). Striped clears 8 (row/col).

cascadeDepthBonus._reason: Each cascade step increases combo tier. At step 5+, combo x1.75-2.0. Bonus of 0.3/step * 10 steps = 3.0 max.

matchCountBonus._reason: match3 is baseline (no bonus). match4 creates special gem (+1.5). match5 creates rainbow (+4.0). 6+ is rare but extremely powerful.

dodge.condition: Boss skill warning active AND (freeDodges > 0 OR (mana >= 30 AND acceptPaidDodge))

timing._doNot: Don't dodge normal attacks (only dodge skill attacks). Don't dodge if boss HP < 3% (waste).
timing._assassinNote: Assassin freq=3: each of 3 hits needs separate dodge. Costs 3 dodges total. Only dodge if can afford all 3 or accept partial.

dodge._reason: Boss skills deal 2-5x normal damage. Dodging prevents massive HP loss. Free dodges are zero-cost. Highest priority.

romBoc.condition: Player HP < 40% OR (boss archetype=assassin AND boss attack imminent) OR need debuff immunity

timing._doNot: Don't use if HP > 70% and no assassin threat. Don't stack with existing shield (wait for expiry).
timing._note: Lv5 grants debuff immunity — use preemptively against controller bosses.

romBoc._reason: Shield (10-30% maxHP) + damage reduction (15-35%). At Lv5 also debuff immune. Critical for survival against burst.

samDongULT.condition: ULT charge >= 80 mana (60 at Lv5) AND boss has no active shield AND boss not in invuln phase

timing._doNot: Don't fire into boss shield (80% reduction wastes ULT). Don't fire if boss HP < 2% (overkill).
timing._note: Lv5 pierces DEF + 2s stun. Against high-DEF bosses, ULT is primary damage source.

samDongULT._reason: 3.0x-5.0x ATK multiplier. Lv5 pierces DEF and stuns 2s. Best single-hit damage in game.

otHiem.condition: Off cooldown (20s CD) AND boss HP > 10% AND no active buff already

timing._doNot: Don't use when boss HP < 10% (fight ending soon, waste CD). Don't use right before boss shield phase.
timing._note: Lv5: +50% DEF bypass + 20% crit + cleanse. Use before ULT against high-DEF bosses for combo.

otHiem._reason: +20-60% damage buff. At Lv5 bypasses 50% DEF. Best used right before ULT or big combo turn.

archetypeOverrides._doc: Bias values ADDED to situationWeights.normal. Positive = increase, negative = decrease.

glass_cannon._reason: DEF=0 means ATK gems deal full value (no reduction). High ATK means need some HP heal. DEF less useful since boss hits infrequent (freq=1).

assassin._reason: freq=2-3 means 2-3 hits per attack cycle. At ATK=300, freq=3 = 900 damage/cycle. Need heavy HP/DEF to survive. Dodge is critical.

tank._reason: DEF 150-450 reduces ATK by 23-47%. Star charges ULT which pierces DEF (Lv5). Star is 3x more efficient than ATK against tanks.

controller._reason: Balanced with debuffs. Debuff situations (healBlock, armorBreak) handled by situationWeights overrides. Small all-around boost for flexibility.

healer._reason: Must out-DPS heal rate (1.5-3% HP/tick). At 2% heal on 8000 HP boss = 160 HP/tick to overcome. Favor ATK+star for sustained DPS.

hybrid._reason: Mixed traits. Slight star bias since DEF may be present. Adapt via situationWeights as fight progresses.

mixed._reason: Unpredictable boss. Slight HP bias for safety. Let situationWeights handle specifics as conditions change.

deVuongStrategy._doc: De Vuong (Final Boss) — 4 phases. Each phase has unique weights and skill timing.

skillTiming.dodge: Save free dodges for Phase 2. Only dodge if HP < 30%.
skillTiming.romBoc: Use only if HP drops below 35%. Conserve CD for Phase 2.
skillTiming.samDongULT: Fire ULT when ready — DEF=500 means 50% reduction on ATK but ULT Lv5 pierces.
skillTiming.otHiem: Use before ULT for DEF bypass combo. +50% DEF bypass makes ULT devastating.

phase1._reason: DEF=500 = 50% ATK reduction. ATK gems nearly useless (0.5). Star is king — charges ULT which pierces DEF. Farm star gems, survive, fire ULTs.

skillTiming.dodge: CRITICAL. freq=3 = 3 hits per attack = 1800 damage/cycle. Use free dodges here. Each hit costs 1 dodge.
skillTiming.romBoc: Activate IMMEDIATELY at phase start. Shield + damage reduction essential.
skillTiming.samDongULT: Fire when ready. DEF=0 so all damage lands. Stun gives 2s breathing room.
skillTiming.otHiem: Use when available. +dmg helps end phase faster. Cleanse removes any carried debuffs.

phase2._reason: 600 ATK * freq=3 = 1800 dmg/cycle. Lethal. HP/DEF critical for survival. Dodge is lifesaver. ATK works at full value (DEF=0).

skillTiming.dodge: Less critical. freq=1 with ATK=350 is manageable. Save remaining dodges for Phase 4.
skillTiming.samDongULT: Fire on cooldown. Must out-DPS 3% heal. ULT pierces DEF=200.
skillTiming.otHiem: Use on cooldown. +dmg + DEF bypass essential to overcome heal rate.

phase3._reason: 3% heal is massive (boss regens ~300 HP/tick on 10K HP). DEF=200 reduces ATK by 29%. Star/ULT is best DPS. Must maintain constant pressure.

skillTiming.dodge: Use ALL remaining dodges. ATK=800 * freq=2 = 1600 dmg/cycle. Every dodge matters.
skillTiming.romBoc: Activate immediately. Shield buys time for DPS.
skillTiming.samDongULT: Fire ASAP. Every ULT could be the kill shot. 2s stun delays self-destruct.
skillTiming.otHiem: Use immediately. Max damage buff for final push.

phase4._reason: Race against self-destruct timer (2% boss HP/5s). DEF=0 means ATK full value. ALL-IN damage. Survival secondary — boss kills itself if you stall.

weeklyBossStrategy._doc: Weekly bosses: 8 bosses, HP 500-10K, DEF=0, no debuffs, no phases. Simpler than campaign.

skillTiming.dodge: Use free dodges only. Not worth spending OGN on weekly bosses.
skillTiming.samDongULT: Fire when ready. DEF=0 so full damage.

weeklyBossStrategy._reason: DEF=0 on all weekly bosses means ATK is king. No debuffs simplifies strategy. Star for ULT burst. Minimal DEF investment since no prolonged fights.

lv1.name: Free
lv1._note: Random valid swap. No intelligence. Baseline experience.

lv2.name: Basic
lv2._note: Evaluates all valid swaps, picks highest weighted score. Uses situationWeights + archetypeOverrides.

lv3.name: Advanced
lv3._note: Greedy + simulates 1-step cascade to find chain reactions. Auto-dodge with 5 free dodges.

lv4.name: Pro
lv4._note: Monte Carlo Tree Search with 30 simulations. Auto-dodge + auto-ULT. 30% faster instant recharge.

lv5.name: Elite
lv5._note: Full MCTS 80 sims. All skills auto-managed. 7 free dodges. 50% faster instant recharge. Best possible play.
